debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hEq⟩
  -- evaluate at r = 0, t = 0 to get a linear functional in v
  let φ : (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ :=
    (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))).comp (LinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  have hφ : ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), δL v = φ v := by
    intro v
    have := hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ)
    -- split (v, 1) into (v, 0) + (0, 1)
    have hsplit :
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) =
          fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) +
          fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa [map_add, Prod.smul_mk, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
        using (map_add (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (v, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)))
    -- show time-derivative term is zero using v = 0 and δL 0 = 0
    have htime : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
      have h0 := hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : ℝ)
      simpa [hδL0] using h0
    -- finish
    have : δL v =
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa [hsplit, htime] using this
    -- rewrite via φ
    simpa [φ, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.inl_apply] using this
  -- represent linear functional by an inner product with a vector
  rcases (InnerProductSpace.exists_eq_inner (𝕜 := ℝ) (E := EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) φ) with
    ⟨g, rfl⟩
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  simpa [hφ v] using (hφ v)
